form.formComment: Racing second-up. Showed plenty of promise winning at debut as to post a big 5.5 len win. Dromahane P2p on April 14 2024 over 4828m on heavy going defeating Giantsgrave with 60kg in a jumps. Went for a spell before returning finished second of 21 runners at Cork on March 19 over 4023m, 1.3 len behind Royal Gladiator with 75.5kg at $3. Top chance.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At very big odds at debut, finished 13th of 14 starters at Cork on March 19 over 3419m, 66 len behind Lynches Knock with 71.5kg at $51. Last start finished eighth of 11 runners at Limerick on March 31 over 3218m, slow track; 22 len behind Beauvallon with 73kg at $251. Needs to improve sharply to feature.
